title: Whisper Ring Keyboard Mode
desc: Microphone-driven dictation mode for WKAppBot. Use when you want whisper dictate or whisper-ring --keyboard to convert live speech into typed text: prefer focusless WM_CHAR/PostMessage input first, keep user focus stable, and fall back to real keyboard semantics only when a control requires them.
steps: Start whisper dictate or whisper-ring --keyboard and confirm the target input surface is ready.
Route recognized text through the existing input pipeline; prefer WM_CHAR/PostMessage focusless paths first.
Use SendInput only when a control truly requires physical keyboard semantics.
Verify by reading back the target text and checking that user focus did not move.
Treat the speech bridge as dictation, not just a visualizer.
author: claude
